---
title: "<i>Mission Life, or, The Emigrant and the Heathen</i>"
---

## <i>Mission Life, or, The Emigrant and the Heathen</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This was a periodical published by Rivington, which ran from 1866 to 1890.  It was edited by the Rev. [[person:604]J. J. Halcombe], editorial secretary to the SPCK.  It is not to be confused with the <i>Mission Field</i>, the organ of the SPG.  CMY commented (1 Jan 1872) on the details of Bishop Patteson\'s death provided by Charles Hyde Brooke’s account in <i>Mission Life</i>.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
